name: avoidance-injection
description: Avoidance gate — SQL/XSS/code-injection payload structures. Multiline flag enables end-of-line ($) anchors. Union of prior Python and TypeScript pattern sets — Python contributed 9 SQL OR-variants and statement chaining, TypeScript already had the rest. Quote characters expressed via hex escapes (\x22) so the registry source is safe under Python r-string emit and JS RegExp literal alike. Covered by parity tests.
